## shrine get applications

List deployed applications

### Synopsis

Display all deployed applications, optionally filtered by team.

```
shrine get applications [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help   help for applications
```

### Options inherited from parent commands

```
      --config-dir string   Configuration directory (searched in order: ~/.config/shrine, ~/.shrine.conf.yml, /etc/shrine)
      --state-dir string    State directory (default is ~/.local/share/shrine or /var/lib/shrine)
  -t, --team string         Filter by team name
```

### SEE ALSO

* [shrine get](shrine-get/)	 - Display one or many resources
